burrow
ChangelogRoadmap
Download

Roadmap

What's shipped, what's being built, and what we're weighing next.

A guide, not a promise — order shifts with what people ask for. Upvote an issue to push it up, or open a request ↗. Updated Jun 23, 2026.

Planned

4Decided — not started yet.
Signed & notarized macOS builds

A Developer ID signature so Gatekeeper trusts Burrow without the right-click → Open dance.

infra
In-app auto-update

Once builds are signed, silent background update checks with a one-click install (Sparkle).

feat
Bundle a pinned mo engine in every release

Engine included in the download, so there's no separate install step on any install path.

infra#54 ↗
Windows preview → first stable

Data-loss and supply-chain hardening, parity, and test coverage before it loses the “preview” label.

feat#93 ↗

Considering

1Weighing it — upvote to push it up.
Persistent one-tap “run all” Tune-Up

A saved Smart-Care routine you trigger in one tap from the dashboard.

feat#77 ↗

Recently shipped

9Landed in the latest releases.
No-freeze live dashboard

Streaming live status (mo status --watch)
